# opnsense_acme_account (Resource)
Manages an ACME account on OPNsense. Requires `os-acme-client`.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_acme_account" "letsencrypt" {
  name  = "letsencrypt-prod"
  ca    = "letsencrypt"
  email = "admin@example.com"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Account name.

### Optional

- `ca` (String) Certificate authority (e.g., `letsencrypt`, `letsencrypt_test`, `zerossl`, `buypass`).
- `description` (String) Description.
- `email` (String) Contact email for the ACME account.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this account is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_acme_account.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
